papers.title: The French Glioblastoma Biobank (FGB): a nationwide infrastructure for GBM research
papers.access_route: Application to FGB steering committee; coordinated by INSERM with 24 contributing French centers; contact fgb@inserm.fr
papers.notes: n=1087 patients from 24 centers; fresh frozen + FFPE paired; plasma and serum available; IDH status, MGMT methylation, and EGFR amplification documented; age at diagnosis available — young patient subset identifiable; multisectorial sampling for ITH studies

papers.title: Recurrent glioblastoma: molecular landscape in the French Glioblastoma Biobank
papers.access_route: Application to FGB steering committee (same access route as primary biobank)
papers.notes: Recurrent GBM subset of FGB; paired primary and recurrence specimens; plasma longitudinal; temozolomide treatment history documented; useful for treatment-failure cohort enrichment

papers.title: Pilot metabolomics study of fresh/frozen GBM tissue and matched plasma
papers.notes: Pilot metabolomics study; fresh/frozen GBM + matched plasma; demonstrates metabolite extraction feasibility from frozen GBM; IDH1 wild-type confirmed; small n but validates pre-analytical protocol

notes: All three papers draw from the FGB ecosystem. FGB (n=1087) is the dominant and only large-scale GBM biobank with matched frozen + plasma in France. Young patient subset (age <50) can be filtered from the registry. Access via formal FGB application; all 24 contributing centers are de-identified.
